purpose: Path from ChatGPT scene response to verified Academy 1198 state changes after a turn.
core_rule: ChatGPT does not change files directly. It returns proposed_updates/state payload. API validates source, visibility and scene evidence before applying.

pipeline.name: receive_scene_response
pipeline.description: API receives scene_text, footer/choices, and proposed updates.

pipeline.name: validate_response_shape
pipeline.description: Check output sections and no forbidden writer behavior.

pipeline.name: validate_proposed_updates
pipeline.description: Check each update for scene evidence, source access, visibility, and allowed target.

pipeline.name: reject_unsafe_updates
pipeline.description: Reject hidden/past/future updates without scene evidence or trigger.

pipeline.name: normalize_safe_updates
pipeline.description: Compress safe updates into short atomic patches.

pipeline.name: apply_turn_result
pipeline.description: Apply only validated changes to current state, relationships, story lines, memory/state files.

pipeline.name: write_audit
pipeline.description: Record brief diagnostics: applied, rejected, reason.

never_apply_directly: hidden past as current known fact
future relationship state before scene evidence
new character presence without scene reason
changes to characters/<id>/*.yaml from a normal scene turn
calendar/canon_lore rewrites from a normal scene turn
note: Academy state knowledge is now split into state/character_memory/<id>.json and state/relationship_pairs/<a>__<b>.json. Global knowledge_state/relationships files are disabled migration stubs.
